entities.name: V
entities.context: individual associated with the knowledge system

entities.name: Gmail
entities.context: email service used for searching email context

entities.name: API integrator
entities.context: concept used for fetching calendar events and searching Gmail

entities.name: state manager
entities.context: concept used for tracking processed events

entities.name: profile manager
entities.context: concept used for managing attendee profiles

entities.name: V-OS tags
entities.context: tags used to filter calendar events

relationships.context: V uses meeting_processor.py to orchestrate systems
meeting_processor.py uses Gmail to search for email context
meeting_processor.py uses API integrator to fetch events
meeting_processor.py uses state manager to track processed events
meeting_processor.py uses profile manager to manage attendee profiles
V-OS tags are used to filter calendar events in meeting_processor.py
